---
title: "Assignment 2"
---

# Assignment 2

```{r}
library(dslabs)
data(polls_us_election_2016)

my_first <- "Saltuk"
my_birth_year <- 2000
k <- (nchar(my_first) + my_birth_year) %% 15 + 8

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(polls_us_election_2016, k)
} else {
  tail(polls_us_election_2016, k)
}

total_na <- sum(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))
print(total_na)

column_na <- colSums(is.na(polls_us_election_2016))

sequence_column_na <- sort(column_na, decreasing = TRUE)

head(sequence_column_na, 8)

new_data <- polls_us_election_2016

for (col in names(new_data)) {
  x <- new_data[[col]]
  
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
  
    x[is.na(x)] <- my_birth_year + k
    
  } else if (is.character(x)) {
    
    x[is.na(x)] <- paste0(my_first, "", k)
    
  } else if (is.factor(x)) {
   
    levels(x) <- c(levels(x), paste0(my_first, "", k))
  
    x[is.na(x)] <- paste0(my_first, "", k)
  }
  
  new_data[[col]] <- x
}

if (k %% 2 == 0) {
  head(new_data, k)
} else {
  tail(new_data, k)
}
kalan_na <- sum(is.na(new_data))
print(kalan_na)

print(anyNA(new_data))
```
